chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR. Criminal Misc. Application No. S- 651 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on CMA 5683/2022 (Ex) 3. For hearing of main case. 19.02.2024. None present, no intimation received. Accordingly, this Criminal Misc. Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Irfan/PA
